svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram id="llm-verification" name="LLM Verification"><mxGraphModel dx="1110" dy="745" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" SARIF)" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="350" y="24" width="240" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="init" value="Initialize & call the LLM load guided questions · build prompt · LiteLLM call parse JSON: answers → data_flow → verdict → confidence → context_needed" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="190" y="107" width="560" height="86" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="decide" value="verdict?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="380" y="234" width="180" height="104" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="chkcit" value="specific citations present?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="814" y="225" width="212" height="122" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="downgrade" value="Downgrade confidence → Low" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="800" y="433" width="240" height="58" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="returntp" value="Return verdict — TP / FP" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="788" y="627" width="264" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="chkbudget" value="turn < max_iter & min_iter met?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="342" y="401" width="256" height="122" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="fetch" value="Get context · ContextProvider (CSV lookup — no SAST re-run) caller · struct · global · callees · free_sites · destructor · field_writes" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="190" y="604" width="560" height="96" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="returnnmd" value="Return NMD queue for human review" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="24" y="435" width="252" height="54" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" target="init"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="init" target="decide"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="TP / FP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="decide" target="chkcit"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="NMD" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="decide" target="chkbudget"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" value="yes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="chkcit" target="returntp"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" value="no · High/Med" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="chkcit" target="downgrade"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="downgrade" target="returntp"><mxGeometry as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: LLM Verification — verdict · get context · verify a finding

text.tspan: load guided questions · build prompt · LiteLLM call
parse JSON: answers → data_flow → verdict → confidence → context_needed
Get context · ContextProvider (CSV lookup — no SAST re-run)
